summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of updated service and industry pages with hero images, expandable subservices, tech stack sections, process roadmaps, stats grids, FAQ accordions, and contact forms
passed_tests: Service detail page /services/artificial-intelligence loads with hero image on right side
Service detail page has 8 expandable subservice cards with 4 sub-items each
Service detail page has tech stack section with 4 categories
Service detail page has process section with 6 numbered steps
Service detail page has Why Choose Us section with stats grid (6 stats)
Service detail /services/generative-ai loads with all sections
Service detail /services/devops loads with all sections
Industry detail page /industries/healthcare loads with hero image and all sections
Industry detail page /industries/fintech loads with hero image and all sections
Solution detail page /solutions/databrain-ai loads with hero image
Case study detail /case-studies/ai-video-creation loads with hero image
Contact form on service detail page submits successfully to /api/contact with success message
FAQ accordion works on all detail pages
Subservice card expand/collapse toggles correctly (clicking same card closes, clicking different opens new one)
All 8 service slugs load correctly: artificial-intelligence, generative-ai, custom-software, mobile-apps, ai-agents, llm-development, devops, data-engineering
